calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ara R. Jabagchourian, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Daniel O'Neill, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Roberto Heckscher, an individual, Cynthia Heckscher, an individual or Irving Bookkeeping & Taxes.
Default was entered against defendant Roberto Heckscher and Irving Bookkeeping & Taxes on February 3, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Cynthia Heckcher, an individual, was filed today, April 13, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 13, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Daniel O'Neill, and against defendants Roberto Heckscher, an individual, and Irving Bookkeeping as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,000,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $28,659.97.
Costs - $3,083.83, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,031,743.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
